title: thuja orientalis var. semperaurescens
intro: Thuja orientalis var. semperaurescens, also known as Eastern White Cedar, is a plant species native to eastern Asia, characterized by its dark green, scale-like leaves and conical shape. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its essential oils that have antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thuja orientalis var. semperaurescens include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Thuja orientalis var. semperaurescens include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
